# MMKK AI

> MMKK AI is a business technology partner deploying Google Workspace, Microsoft 365,
> HubSpot CRM, Apollo, Google Cloud, and AI Automation for growing businesses across
> Myanmar and Thailand. MMKK AI is an official Google Cloud Co-Sell Partner and a
> Microsoft Azure Deployment Partner.

MMKK AI serves SMEs, mid-market companies, enterprises, international schools, real
estate companies, technology companies, and professional services firms. Support and
billing are handled locally in Myanmar and Thailand, alongside a US office.

## Solutions
- [Google Workspace](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/google-workspace): setup, licensing, and migration
- [Microsoft 365](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/microsoft-365): setup, licensing, and migration
- [HubSpot CRM](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/hubspot-crm): implementation and onboarding
- [Apollo Lead Generation](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/apollo-lead-generation): outbound prospecting setup
- [Google Cloud](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/google-cloud): architecture, migration, and cost optimization
- [AI Automation](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/ai-automation): applied AI workflows
- [TeamViewer](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/teamviewer): remote support and device management
- [Adobe Business](https://mmkkai.com/en/solutions/adobe-business): Creative Cloud and Acrobat licensing
